title: GARBAGE, SEWER, AND WATER DISCOUNT REFERRAL PROGRAM - 211info
text: COMMUNITY ACTION ENERGY SERVICES GARBAGE, SEWER, AND WATER DISCOUNT REFERRAL PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides referral to the City of Salem's Rate Relief program for garbage, sewer, and water discounts. 4700 Silverton Road NE Salem, OR 97305 Eligibility: -City of Salem account holder residing in the home -Age 60 and older or documented permanent disability household member -Gross household income does not exceed 60% of state median income based on family size -Referals made for current year LIHEAP/OEAP recipients (October-September) Hours: Walk in: Monday-Thursday 8am-4:30pm Phones: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, closed holidays Email (503) 588-9016 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 588-9016 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Birth dates for all household members, Photo ID, Proof of income, Current garbage, sewer, or water bills, Current LIHEAP/OEAP payment receipt to the garbage company to receive a discount, and other documents may be required LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: City of Salem TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Cherriots bus routes stop 2-4 blocks away Services: Discounted Sewer Service * Disabilities Issues Discounted Sewer Service * Older Adults Discounted Trash/Recycling Service * Disabilities Issues Discounted Trash/Recycling Service * Older Adults Discounted Water Service * Disabilities Issues Discounted Water Service * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: UTILITIES - ENERGY SERVICES PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COMMUNITY ACTION ENERGY SERVICES
